The '''''Odysseus''''' was an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==History==
The ''Odysseus'' was part of a convoy along with [[Thor (Strike-class)|''Thor'']] and ''[[Zeus]]''. The convoy was to be attacked by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]], and the starships had to rely on [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue]] and [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadrons]] to give the starships enough time to escape into hyperspace.

==Behind the scenes==
The outcome depends on which side the player takes.

Although the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] featured in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' are identified in-game as [[MC80a Star Cruiser]]s,<ref name="XvT" /> that term was later [[Retroactive continuity|retconned]] by the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''<ref name="EGW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref> to refer to a different model of [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] depicted in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="endnotes12">{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/25364458982/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-12|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 12}}</ref>
